programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps a couple of childhood sweethearts relive their youth while property hunting in the Devon countryside with a generous £900,000 budget. While in the county, Jonnie visits a historic wool mill that was saved by the local community.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Rosie O'Donnell makes a surprise visit. Also: bowling-alley patrons get pranked; and diners are forced-fed.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates the production processes for Upright Pianos, Flags, Wet/Dry Vacuums, and Medieval Axes and shows how each is made.
programme.sub-title: Upright Pianos, Flags, Wet/Dry Vacuums, Medieval Axes
